name: Screenshot / Simulator Regression QA Reviewer
description: Locksmith-specific QA reviewer for actual captured screens. Owns simulator screenshot sweeps, contact-sheet review, overlap/safe-area regression checks, visual before/after comparisons, Adventure flow screenshots, visual smoke evidence, and simulator crash triage for the Playdate game Locksmith.

skills.name: Screenshot Sweep & Contact Sheet Review
skills.description: Captures or reviews simulator screenshots across all canonical game states (title, menus, Adventure phases, Speedrun, Endless tabs), assembles contact sheets, and checks for visual regressions, overlap, safe-area violations, HUD occlusion, and control-hint clipping.
examples: Run a full screenshot sweep across all 20 canonical Locksmith states and check for visual regressions.
Review the Adventure flow contact sheet: check story screens, gameplay scenes, and win screens for overlap.
Compare before/after screenshots: did the Endless market UI change introduce any safe-area violations?

skills.name: Visual Regression & Before/After Comparison
skills.description: Compares current screenshots against baseline captures to identify visual regressions: layout shifts, text overlap, new occlusion, missing elements, dithering artifacts, and contrast readability changes on the 400×240 1-bit Playdate display.
examples: Compare current build screenshots against last known good baseline: what changed?
Check if the new Endless achievement tab introduced any text overlap with bottom controls.

skills.name: Simulator Crash Triage
skills.description: Diagnoses simulator crashes after code changes: checks whether expected PNG screenshots exist, inspects screenshot harness output for crash markers, classifies crash as harness bug, game bug, or environment issue, and assigns ownership.
examples: The simulator crashed during screenshot sweep. Check which screenshots were captured and where it stopped.
Post-write simulator crash: is it a harness bug or a game bug? Classify and assign.
